data.title: Templum to Offer Premier Private Market Investment Opportunities in Perplexity AI, OpenAI, and Colossal Biosciences to SoFi Members
data.description: A short-term opportunity is now available for investors to gain entry to popular private market leaders. On March 5, 2026, Templum, a top infrastructure provider for private markets, partnered with SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI), a comprehensive platform for digital financial services, to introduce this offering.

data.title: Alliance for Genomic Discovery expands with Regeneron Genetics Center membership and new proteomics data offering
data.description: The dataset has now surpassed 312,000 whole genomes along with longitudinal clinical data. Leading the way is GSK, overseeing an additional increase of 50,000 whole genomes combined with proteomic data. This progression is part of an initiative spearheaded by Illumina, Inc. and Nashville Biosciences, LLC. The news was announced in San Diego on March 5, 2026.

data.title: BAP Launches Seafood You Can Trust Marketing Toolkit, The Save Mart Companies First Retailer to Activate Campaign
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Best Aquaculture Practices (BAP) introduced the Seafood You Can Trust marketing toolkit. This initiative is a part of a comprehensive campaign aimed at enabling retailers and foodservice operators to better convey information about sustainable seafood practices. The toolkit is designed to provide insights to support this effort, ensuring that the message about responsible seafood sourcing is effectively communicated. This campaign signifies a step towards promoting transparency and accountability in the seafood industry, aligning with the growing consumer demand for ethically sourced products.

data.title: StubHub Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description: StubHub Holdings Inc (NYSE: STUB) released their fourth-quarter financial results, revealing adjusted EPS results that fell short of expectations. They reported a quarterly loss of 21 cents per share, missing the analyst consensus of 20 cents per share. However, the company posted quarterly sales of $449.173 million, exceeding the analyst estimate of $430.249 million. Eric Baker, the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of StubHub, noted achievement of significant milestones in 2025, including robust marketplace growth. For more detailed information, the entire story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bond Expands Adoption within Financial Services Industry with Addition of Another European Fintech Customer
data.description: The fast uptake of Bond's AI-driven preventative personal security platform by a wide range of companies, from startups to major financial institutions, underscores its versatility. This platform has gained traction quickly among diverse enterprises, demonstrating its effectiveness and appeal.

data.title: Dice Provides GlossaryTech to its Customers at No Cost, Arming Tech Recruiters with Instant Terminology Clarity
data.description: In Centennial, Colo., Dice, a subsidiary of DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX), a prominent tech career platform, revealed a partnership with GlossaryTech. GlossaryTech is a free browser add-on offering swift, clear definitions of technical jargon for tech recruiters. It is integrated into the Dice Recruiter Hub at zero extra expense for clients. This partnership aims to assist recruiting teams in assessing tech candidates more swiftly and securely. The tool ensures recruiters can understand technical terms efficiently during their work.

data.title: PACS Group, Inc. Appoints Dr. Patrick Conway, MD, MSc to Board of Directors
data.description: Salt Lake City-based PACS Group, Inc. (NYSE: PACS), a leading post-acute healthcare platform, has appointed Patrick H. Conway, MD, MSc, to its Board of Directors. Dr. Conway's addition is significant for the industry, as he brings a unique blend of clinical expertise and federal regulatory experience. This move highlights PACS Group's focus on growth and innovation in the post-acute and skilled nursing sector.

data.title: Cheer Games Raises $4.5M in Pre-seed Round Led by Makers Fund With Participation From Play Ventures, Setting a New Standard for Mobile Game Franchises
data.description: A mobile puzzle studio called Cheer Games, established by former senior leaders at Lion Studios and behind the popular game Hexa Sort, has successfully secured a $4.5 million pre-seed investment round. This funding was led by Makers Fund, along with contributions from Play Ventures and a select group of angel investors. The main aim of this financial support is to speed up the development of Cheer's forthcoming range of games and to grow its Barcelona headquarters by hiring additional international talent. The CEO of Cheer Games, Emre, and the rest of the founding team are leading this initiative.

data.title: AlphaMetricx Unveils Advanced Conversational AI for Communications Teams
data.description: A significant development has taken place in Richardson, Texas, where AlphaMetricx has introduced a cutting-edge conversational AI system. This AI technology is poised to establish a new benchmark in reputation intelligence for communication experts within the enterprise sector. The new launch is projected to significantly impact the industry with its innovative capabilities and advancements in artificial intelligence.

data.title: What 10,000 Patient Intakes Taught Us About Burnout, and What It Means for Emergency Care
data.description: ElleLogic AI, a leading AI co-pilot for high-acuity care, has revealed fresh findings from examining more than 10,000 anonymous emergency intake scenarios within hospital settings in Canada and the United States. Through six months of analysis using hospital workflow simulations and pilot programs, a notable pattern emerged: burnout symptoms among staff members were closely associated with the intensity, speed, and unpredictability of patient intake, rather than simply the duration of their shifts. The study shed light on the critical impact of patient inflow dynamics on healthcare workers' well-being.

data.title: OpenAI joins forces with 4 top consulting firms in a long-term deal to expand AI agent deployments worldwide.
data.description: OpenAI has entered into a multi-year agreement known as the Frontier Alliance with four leading consulting firms. This collaboration aims to expand the deployment of AI agents for enterprises on a global scale. The partnership involves significant commitments from both parties to enhance the utilization of artificial intelligence in various industries. This strategic alliance is expected to have a profound impact on the widespread implementation of AI technologies, with the goal of fostering innovation and efficiency.
